message:
fix(db): correct file reservation conflict check for shared vs exclusive locks

When requesting a shared (non-exclusive) reservation, the conflict check
now correctly looks for ANY existing reservation held by others, not just
exclusive ones. When requesting an exclusive reservation, it checks
against all reservations from other agents.

Previously, shared reservations could be granted even when an exclusive
lock existed from another agent — this was a concurrency correctness bug
that could allow reads during an exclusive write operation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
